Container.Name: Media-Optimizer
Container.Overview: Analyse your Sonarr and Radarr libraries to find space wasters, codec upgrade candidates, and optimisation opportunities.[br][br]Features:[br]- Connect to Sonarr and Radarr using their API keys[br]- View total library size, average file sizes, and quality breakdown[br]- Sort by size, MB/minute, codec, resolution, and year[br]- Identify large files with inefficient codecs (h264 vs HEVC)[br]- Export data as CSV or JSON for further analysis[br]- API keys stay in your browser — never sent to external servers[br][br]Enter your Sonarr/Radarr URL and API key directly in the web UI to get started.
Container.DonateText: If you like my work, please consider a donation!
